title: Find All Anagrams in a String
problem_statement: Return all start indices of p’s anagrams in s.

examples.explanation: The substrings "cba" and "bac" are anagrams of "abc".

constraints: s and p consist of lowercase English letters.
intuition: Use a fixed-size sliding window with frequency counts to detect anagrams in O(n).

approaches.name: Sliding window with frequency match
approaches.description: Slide a window of length p.length across s while maintaining counts of characters and comparing them to p’s counts.
approaches.why_not: Sorting each substring is O(n * m log m) and too slow.

interview_qa.a: All anagrams of p have the same length, so the window size is constant.

interview_qa.q: How do you compare counts efficiently?
interview_qa.a: Use a fixed 26-length array for lowercase letters.
